unread.body: Hello! (quarterly, semi-annual, or annual terms availa
unread.suggested_reply:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about content opportunities. I think there may be some confusion here—it looks like you're pitching us your services, but we're actually NeuroTech.com, the directory where *your company* (Mydecine) is listed. 

If you're interested in upgrading Mydecine's profile to a featured listing ($199/month) or posting job openings ($250 each), you can set that up directly at https://neurotech.com/advertise.

Let us know if you have any questions!

The NeuroTech.com Team

unread.suggested_reply:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out about content opportunities. I think there may be some confusion—it looks like you're pitching *to* us, but we're actually the directory listing *your* company. We offer featured profiles ($199/month) and job posts ($250) for neurotechnology companies like Mydecine. If you're interested in upgrading your current listing or posting a job opening, you can get started here: https://neurotech.com/advertise

Best,
The NeuroTech.com Team
